case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. VS. HEPHAESTUS INNOVATIONS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-01-2021 CONTINUED TO NOV-03-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
